image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why your blood type matters? It’s more than just a letter.
Context visual: Blood types are determined by genetics, influenced by our parents’ genes.
Escalation visual: But it’s not just simple inheritance. A, B, AB, and O types can mix and match!
Evidence visual: Research shows blood types can affect disease risk and transfusion compatibility.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But here’s the twist: scientists are still uncovering the full story!
Payoff visual: So, your blood type could shape more than you think. It’s a genetic puzzle!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into blood type mysteries? Hit follow for more science insights!
